title: The Better Pokeblocks Modpack
description: Multiplayer, Cooperative and laid-back Focused Cobblemon+.
body:
The Better Pokeblocks Pack brings a cooperative experience, focused on social gameplay, and laid back fun. 

Primary Features:
Expanded Pokemon availability. 
-   Models and spawning for many more Pokemon than base cobblemon. Pokefinder and Pokeradar

Battle gimmicks and cosmetics.
-   Mega Evolution, Z-Moves, Dynamax, and Terastilazation available. Pokeball stickers and effects 

Make your Pokemon Team Unique 
-   size variation, Costumes, alpha pokemon, and visible held items.

Play alongside your Pokemon. 
-   Pokemon Riding, Pokemon Jobs, Pokemon Fight Mobs.

  Full Mod List
